calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-13-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-13-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the the Presiding Judge Dept. for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Janet Pond.
Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. special appearance for Plaintiff: Capital One Bank.
No appearance by the Defendant: Elizabeth Delauro.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Principal $1,984.41
Prejudgment Interest $163.65
Attorney's Fees $450.00
Costs $227.00 for a Total of $2,825.06
Counsel to prepare Judgment (by 11-27-07)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-09-2007 Continued To Nov-13-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-26-2007 Set For Trial On Oct-09-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
